title: Sign in to reach the dashboard
description: Verifies a user can sign in from the login page and land on the authenticated dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Sign in and land on the dashboard with key metrics visible
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can sign in and reach the main dashboard where key overview metrics are displayed.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify key dashboard metrics are displayed

title: Dashboard loads key overview metrics
description: Verifies the dashboard loads for an authenticated user and shows key metrics across operations, inventory, and finance.

steps.description: Verify overview metrics for operations, inventory, and finance are displayed

title: Protected route requires login when logged out
description: Verifies that attempting to access a protected page while logged out routes the user to the login page.

steps.description: Verify the user is redirected to the login page

title: Sign out redirects to login and ends the session
description: Verifies that a user can sign out from the app and is returned to the login page with the session ended.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the login page

title: Session-gated navigation across main modules works when signed in
description: Verifies that a signed-in user can access Ops, Inventory, Finance, and Admin pages via in-app navigation without being redirected to login.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to operations
Click the navigation link to inventory
Click the navigation link to finance
Click the navigation link to admin
Verify the admin page content is displayed

title: Close the shift from Ops
description: Verifies a supervisor can end the shift from the Attendance tab, confirm the action, and see a shift-closed status.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open Operations
Verify a shift closed status is visible

title: Create an invoice with multiple line items and see it in the invoice list
description: Verifies that a user can create an invoice with multiple line items and required metadata and then see the invoice in the invoices list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to finance
Add the first invoice line item with valid description and amount
Add an additional invoice line item with valid description and amount
Fill "Test Recipient Co." into the recipient field
Verify the new invoice appears in the invoice list

title: Inventory update cycle: update material quantity and see updated stock level
description: Verifies that a user can update an existing material quantity and see the stock level updated in the inventory list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to inventory
Select a material from the inventory list
Open the update stock dialog for the selected material
Fill a valid updated quantity into the quantity field
Verify the selected material shows the updated stock level in the inventory list

title: Sign out returns user to login
description: Verifies an authenticated user can sign out from the profile drawer and is returned to the login page.

steps.description: Verify the user is on the login page

title: Generate transaction report with date range and export to PDF
description: Verifies that a user can filter transactions by a valid date range, generate a report, and export it to a PDF file.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to finance
Select a valid start date in the report date range
Select a valid end date in the report date range
Verify a PDF export is initiated

title: Sort attendance logs to present workers
description: Verifies a supervisor can view attendance logs in Ops and sort/filter the view to show Present status entries.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open Operations
Sort or filter attendance by Present
Verify the attendance view is showing Present entries

title: Add a new material with name and unit and see it listed
description: Verifies that a user can add a new material by providing required fields and the new material appears in the catalog list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to inventory
Fill "Test Material A" into the material name field
Select a valid unit for the material
Verify a new material entry is displayed in the catalog list

title: Access admin settings and view administrative sections
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can navigate to the Admin page and see the administrative sections for management and configuration.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Admin
Verify administrative sections for user management and site configuration are displayed

title: Add payroll configuration and view it in payroll list
description: Verifies a user can add a payroll configuration with base salary, PF, and medical amounts and see it reflected in the payroll list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open Operations
Fill a valid base salary amount into the base salary field
Fill a valid PF amount into the PF field
Fill a valid medical amount into the medical field
Verify the new payroll configuration appears in the payroll list

title: Ask AI assistant for a site summary from dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the floating assistant on the dashboard and receive a response to a site summary question.

steps.description: Fill a high-level site summary question into the assistant input
Verify the assistant displays a response

title: Ask the AI assistant a dashboard question and receive an in-app response
description: Verifies that a signed-in user can open the floating assistant, ask a domain question, and receive a visible response in the assistant thread.

steps.description: Fill "What materials are low right now?" into the assistant message input
Verify an assistant response message is displayed

title: Open payroll configuration details after adding
description: Verifies a user can open the salary detail modal from a payroll list entry and see configuration details.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open Operations
Fill a valid base salary amount into the base salary field
Fill a valid PF amount into the PF field
Fill a valid medical amount into the medical field
Open the details view for the newly created payroll configuration
Verify a salary detail modal is displayed

title: New material validation: missing unit prevents saving
description: Verifies that attempting to save a new material without selecting a unit shows a validation error and does not complete the add flow.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to inventory
Fill "Test Material Missing Unit" into the material name field
Attempt to save the new material
Verify a unit validation error is visible

title: Required-field validation on login
description: Verifies submitting the login form with missing required credentials shows a validation error and does not sign the user in.

steps.description: Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Trigger Manage Staff placeholder action
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can trigger the Manage Staff action and sees a placeholder indicating the action is UI-only.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Admin
Verify a placeholder indicating the action is UI-only is visible

title: Trigger Site Configuration placeholder action
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can trigger the Site Configuration action and sees a placeholder indicating the action is UI-only.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Admin
Verify a placeholder indicating the action is UI-only is visible

title: Payroll base salary is required
description: Verifies attempting to save payroll configuration without a base salary shows a validation error and does not save.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open Operations
Fill a valid PF amount into the PF field
Fill a valid medical amount into the medical field
Verify a base salary required validation error is visible

title: Admin navigation works from dashboard header layout
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can reach the Admin page via the primary app layout navigation from the dashboard.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Dashboard
Click the navigation link to Admin
Verify the user lands on the Admin page with administrative sections visible

title: Admin page remains usable after interacting with placeholders
description: Verifies that after triggering admin placeholder actions, the Admin page remains usable and the main sections are still accessible.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Admin
Dismiss the placeholder dialog or message
Verify the administrative sections are still displayed and actionable
